## Meeting Purpose

[Deep-dive into GrowthX's content strategy and SEO/AEO capabilities for potential partnership with Rimkus.](https://fathom.video/share/LzgThz2wQHLXynCNJMrwGbxAyAczaPkX?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers an 8-week strategy sprint ($20k) followed by ongoing execution ($12k/mo) to boost SEO/AEO performance](https://fathom.video/share/LzgThz2wQHLXynCNJMrwGbxAyAczaPkX?tab=summary&timestamp=1563.0)
  - [Rimkus faces challenges with strict language guidelines, review processes, and differentiating content across diverse service areas](https://fathom.video/share/LzgThz2wQHLXynCNJMrwGbxAyAczaPkX?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
  - [GrowthX's approach includes custom knowledge bases, audience-specific content adaptation, and agentic research tools to create high-quality, compliant content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/LzgThz2wQHLXynCNJMrwGbxAyAczaPkX?tab=summary&timestamp=558.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Content Strategy Approach

  - [Uses audience-first approach, mapping pain points and jobs-to-be-done across service areas](https://fathom.video/share/LzgThz2wQHLXynCNJMrwGbxAyAczaPkX?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)
  - [Creates custom knowledge bases and artifacts to capture company context and expertise](https://fathom.video/share/LzgThz2wQHLXynCNJMrwGbxAyAczaPkX?tab=summary&timestamp=1121.0)
  - [Employs agentic research tools for comprehensive, high-quality content creation](https://fathom.video/share/LzgThz2wQHLXynCNJMrwGbxAyAczaPkX?tab=summary&timestamp=2964.0)
  - [Adapts content for different audiences while maintaining consistent brand voice](https://fathom.video/share/LzgThz2wQHLXynCNJMrwGbxAyAczaPkX?tab=summary&timestamp=1450.0)
  - [Focuses on both SEO and AEO (AI Engine Optimization) to appear in AI-generated answers](https://fathom.video/share/LzgThz2wQHLXynCNJMrwGbxAyAczaPkX?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)

### Rimkus's Content Challenges

  - [Strict language guidelines due to adjacent litigious industry](https://fathom.video/share/LzgThz2wQHLXynCNJMrwGbxAyAczaPkX?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [Need for technical accuracy and compliance in content](https://fathom.video/share/LzgThz2wQHLXynCNJMrwGbxAyAczaPkX?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
  - [Diverse service areas with potentially conflicting client needs](https://fathom.video/share/LzgThz2wQHLXynCNJMrwGbxAyAczaPkX?tab=summary&timestamp=716.0)
  - [Current piecemeal SEO efforts and limited internal bandwidth](https://fathom.video/share/LzgThz2wQHLXynCNJMrwGbxAyAczaPkX?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
  - [Multiple voices across existing website content](https://fathom.video/share/LzgThz2wQHLXynCNJMrwGbxAyAczaPkX?tab=summary&timestamp=1236.0)

### GrowthX's Engagement Model

  - [8-week strategy sprint ($20,000) to set up workflows, calibrate, and start publishing](https://fathom.video/share/LzgThz2wQHLXynCNJMrwGbxAyAczaPkX?tab=summary&timestamp=1120.0)
  - [Ongoing growth execution starting at $12,000/month](https://fathom.video/share/LzgThz2wQHLXynCNJMrwGbxAyAczaPkX?tab=summary&timestamp=2163.0)
  - [100% conversion rate from strategy sprints to full engagements in last 3 months](https://fathom.video/share/LzgThz2wQHLXynCNJMrwGbxAyAczaPkX?tab=summary&timestamp=2254.0)
  - [Collaborative approach, integrating with client teams and experts](https://fathom.video/share/LzgThz2wQHLXynCNJMrwGbxAyAczaPkX?tab=summary&timestamp=3301.0)

### SEO/AEO Performance Metrics

  - [Rimkus's current domain authority: 34/100](https://fathom.video/share/LzgThz2wQHLXynCNJMrwGbxAyAczaPkX?tab=summary&timestamp=2713.0)
  - [Significant opportunity to grow non-branded traffic](https://fathom.video/share/LzgThz2wQHLXynCNJMrwGbxAyAczaPkX?tab=summary&timestamp=1509.0)
  - [GrowthX tracks metrics like average visits per page, brand lift, and LLM referrals](https://fathom.video/share/LzgThz2wQHLXynCNJMrwGbxAyAczaPkX?tab=summary&timestamp=2545.0)
  - [ROI model considers content volume, peak traffic, conversion rates, and LTV](https://fathom.video/share/LzgThz2wQHLXynCNJMrwGbxAyAczaPkX?tab=summary&timestamp=2482.0)

### Technical SEO Considerations

  - [GrowthX focuses on foundational issues: site speed, core web vitals, site map updates](https://fathom.video/share/LzgThz2wQHLXynCNJMrwGbxAyAczaPkX?tab=summary&timestamp=2796.0)
  - [Will provide audits and recommendations but not full web development services](https://fathom.video/share/LzgThz2wQHLXynCNJMrwGbxAyAczaPkX?tab=summary&timestamp=2854.0)
  - [Emphasis on creating valuable content assets and monitoring performance signals](https://fathom.video/share/LzgThz2wQHLXynCNJMrwGbxAyAczaPkX?tab=summary&timestamp=2932.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to share materials (Notion doc, recordings, presentations) for Vitali's meeting with CCO](https://fathom.video/share/LzgThz2wQHLXynCNJMrwGbxAyAczaPkX?tab=summary&timestamp=3210.0)
  - [Vitali to discuss internally with Jen, Nora, and CCO to evaluate partnership potential](https://fathom.video/share/LzgThz2wQHLXynCNJMrwGbxAyAczaPkX?tab=summary&timestamp=3235.0)
  - [Rimkus team to consider level of involvement and collaboration model with GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/LzgThz2wQHLXynCNJMrwGbxAyAczaPkX?tab=summary&timestamp=3249.0)
  - [Further exploration of how to infuse Rimkus's brand and expertise into GrowthX's content creation process](https://fathom.video/share/LzgThz2wQHLXynCNJMrwGbxAyAczaPkX?tab=summary&timestamp=3083.0)
